Clinical intelligence rooted in Asia culture, medicine, and community health reality. 855K NPI-equivalent practitioners. 302K drug interaction pairs.

Your clinical identity builds session by session. BLEU learns you — not from a form, from a relationship that deepens over time.

12 dimensions. 0–100. Builds across every session. Yours alone — never shared with employers or insurers.

ALVAI Clinical Decision Engine · Obihiro

Tell ALVAI what you are experiencing. One clear protocol. No options. No guesswork. One path forward.

ALVAI responds with: State → Root Cause → Protocol → Tonight → Day 7 Check-in.
Clinical Protocol Library · Obihiro

10 protocols. Every condition. 30-day bundles. Clinically audited by Dr. Felicia Stoler, DCN, RDN, FACSM.

Sleep Reset Protocol
Magnesium glycinate + L-theanine + Melatonin
$39–$69 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Cortisol + Stress Protocol
Magnesium bisglycinate + Ashwagandha + L-theanine
$45–$75 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Gut Reset Protocol
Probiotic + L-glutamine + Digestive enzymes
$49–$79 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Energy + Fatigue Protocol
B-complex + CoQ10 + Iron
$35–$59 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Immune Resilience Protocol
Vitamin C + Zinc + Quercetin
$29–$49 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Cognitive Focus Protocol
Lion's Mane + Bacopa + Phosphatidylserine
$55–$85 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Hormonal Support Protocol
D3+K2 + Magnesium + B6
$39–$65 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Movement Recovery Protocol
Creatine + Electrolytes + Collagen
$45–$75 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Longevity Core Protocol
NMN/NR + Resveratrol + Omega-3
$79–$129 · 30 days
Start Protocol →
Mood Stabilization Protocol
5-HTP + SAMe + B-complex
$49–$79 · 30 days

Sleep Intelligence · Obihiro

Log your sleep. ALVAI responds to your specific numbers — not population averages.

Sleep Log
Sleep Reset Protocol — 30 Days
8:30pmMagnesium glycinate 300mg
9:00pmReduce light + screens
9:30pmL-theanine 200mg
BedtimeMelatonin 0.5mg if needed night 3+
Day 7ALVAI outcome check-in
Start Sleep Protocol
Health Finance · Obihiro

GoodRx pricing. Cost Plus Drugs. Patient assistance programs. BLEU surfaces the cheapest clinically valid option first — always.

GoodRx returns actual pricing for Obihiro region. Cost Plus Drug always shown first.
Drug + Supplement Interaction Check · 302K Pairs

CYP450/UGT/P-gp metabolic pathway data. Cannabis intelligence (VERDE/ECSIQ). Check before you take anything.

ALVAI checks your combination against 302,000 verified pairs and CYP450 pathways. This is clinical precision — not a generic warning.
Worksite Wellness · Obihiro Enterprise

BLEU worksite wellness for Obihiro employers. Employees get BLEU free. Employer gets aggregate workforce health intelligence. Individual data never reaches the employer — ever.

Employer Sees
✓ Aggregate LSS distribution
✓ Protocol engagement %
✓ Projected cost reduction
✓ Workforce health trends
✓ Monthly ROI summary
Employer Never Sees
✗ Individual employee data
✗ Individual LSS scores
✗ Personal diagnoses
✗ Medication history
✗ Any identifiable information
Community Wellness · Obihiro

Every protocol completed in Obihiro creates a Jazz Bird research data point. Your outcomes help the next person here get a better protocol. This is how cities heal.

Sweatcoin
Steps earn coins. 20 installs unlocks influencer program.
Free
WeWard
Walking converts to Jazz Bird research donations.
Free
Evidation
Enroll in research. $25–150 per participant.
Free

Health Context

Obihiro community health needs: access to personalized clinical protocols, local practitioner connections, and evidence-based nutrition guidance rooted in Asia health science.

📞 Crisis Support
Contact your local crisis line or visit your nearest emergency mental health service. BLEU Safety Shield responds in under 800ms. You are not alone.
Substance Use Recovery
→ SAMHSA Helpline: 1-800-662-4357 (US)
→ Local AA/NA meeting finder
→ Medication-Assisted Treatment
→ Harm reduction services
→ BLEU Metamorphosis Model

→ Brightside — online psychiatry
→ Done — ADHD care
→ BetterHelp — therapy
→ Alvai — AI therapy interface

Worksite Wellness · Obihiro

BLEU worksite wellness is built and ready for any employer in Obihiro. Clinical sovereignty is absolute — no individual data ever reaches management. Contact Jazz Bird to discuss a pilot.

jazz@jazzbird.org · wellness-satellite.bleu.live
Affiliate Transparency

BLEU earns commissions on some recommendations. Zero ad revenue. Zero paid placements. Clinical recommendation comes first — always.

Fullscript (Dr. Felicia dispensary)20–35% · TIER 1
Amazon Associates4–8% · TIER 1
GoodRxPer-click · TIER 1
BetterHelpPer-subscription · TIER 2
iHerbPERMANENTLY EXCLUDED
Jazz Bird 501(c)(3) maintains zero ad revenue. No advertiser pays for placement. All affiliate relationships disclosed here.
